title: Sumerian/Akkadian: Enuma Anu Enlil: Celestial Omens
description: From the Sumerian/Akkadian corpus: Enuma Anu Enlil: Celestial Omens.
introduction: From the Sumerian/Akkadian corpus: Enuma Anu Enlil: Celestial Omens.

translation.text: From 'Enuma Anu Enlil: Celestial Omens': One of the 117 major literary works of ancient Mesopotamia, recorded on clay tablets in cuneiform script and preserved in the great libraries of Sumer, Akkad, Babylon, and Assyria.
